data.name: Fatrifice 3
data.detailed_description:
Shar's powers are growing even stronger, but not strong enough! She needs another fatrifice for her plan...

The third addition to the Fatrifice series! This time around, it's Delilah's turn. She can't do it alone, though. She will need some help from Shar's minions, each with their own unique abilities! Summon food from the demoness' realm, and watch Delilah expand over and over again as she reaches new sizes!

FEATURES

  • A cute girl who gains weight.

  • A variety of minigames to feed the fatrifice.

  • A selection of Appearances for Delilah.

  • Large selection of upgrades.

  • 2 areas to visit.

  • 3 new girls.

  • Over 30 weight gain stages.

  • Different foods to collect.

  • Cute, fun and lovable story.

  • Tons of replayability.

  • Achievements.

  • Your favorite chubby chasing demoness.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 Aspect Ratio or wider
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 Aspect Ratio or wider
